name: Ridgeline
description: Main side project - self-hosted read-it-later and bookmarking tool for developers. Go + PostgreSQL backend, React/Tailwind frontend, homelab Kubernetes.

name: Glanceboard
description: Second side project - homelab status and uptime dashboard. Lighter scope, issues mirrored from GitLab.

name: Homelab
description: Self-hosted Kubernetes homelab that runs Ridgeline and Glanceboard. Cluster upgrades, node maintenance, ingress, storage, and backups tracked here.

name: Ridgeline CLI
description: Go command-line client for Ridgeline - capture bookmarks, sync tags, and export the reading queue from the terminal.

name: pg-migrate
description: Small Go library for ordered PostgreSQL schema migrations, extracted from Ridgeline and reused across side projects.

name: s3-backup
description: Cron-driven Go tool that snapshots Postgres and homelab volumes to S3-compatible storage. Used to back up Ridgeline and Glanceboard.

name: go-worker-pool
description: Reusable bounded worker-pool library in Go. Backs Ridgeline's background fetch and screenshot jobs.

name: go-lru-cache
description: Generic, concurrency-safe LRU cache in Go used to cache Ridgeline API responses and metadata lookups.

name: raft-kv
description: Learning project - a small distributed key-value store built on a hand-rolled Raft implementation in Go.

name: dotfiles
description: Personal dotfiles, shell config, Neovim setup, and homelab tooling scripts. Tracked loosely as a backlog.

name: go-snippets
description: Collection of small Go snippets and benchmarks - concurrency patterns, generics experiments, and stdlib notes.

name: Ridgeline Web
description: React + Tailwind frontend for Ridgeline - the reading UI, tag browser, and account settings deployed to ridgelinesystems.com.

name: Ridgeline Docs
description: Self-hosting guides, API reference, and changelog for Ridgeline. Markdown content built into a static docs site.

name: Ridgeline Billing
description: Stripe billing, subscription plans, and invoicing for hosted Ridgeline accounts. Webhook handling and dunning logic.

name: Glanceboard Agent
description: Lightweight Go agent that runs on homelab nodes and pushes health-check metrics to the Glanceboard dashboard.

name: Ridgeline Newsletter
description: Ridgeline Digest newsletter - curated reading picks exported from the app and sent via Mailchimp.

name: homelab-k8s
description: Infrastructure-as-code for the homelab Kubernetes cluster - manifests, Helm charts, and GitOps config.

name: Ridgeline Mobile
description: Early-stage React Native client for Ridgeline - offline reading and share-sheet capture. Mostly backlog.

name: Ridgeline Search
description: Search and indexing for Ridgeline - Algolia integration, relevance tuning, and full-text fallbacks.

name: go-snippets Bench
description: Benchmark harness for go-snippets - microbenchmarks comparing concurrency and allocation patterns across Go versions.
